'''Gegren Throsen''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] who governed the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Salliche/Legends|Salliche]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] taking over the operation of [[Salliche Agricultural Corporation]] and the planet's [[Legislature (Salliche)|parliament]].<ref name="CSWE" /> Following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], Throsen arranged for many major officers and [[Bureaucrat/Legends|bureaucrats]] to be replaced by his own staff, and ordered [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] to take over from corporate troops. He also sent the equivalent of a garrison and two [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] to each of the eighteen systems under Sallice Ag's control.<ref name="RR" /> The populace resisted his rule by harassing [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] activity on Salliche and surrounding star systems.<ref name="CSWE" />
